title: System-shipped approval templates
description: Platform-shipped default templates. Seeded on tenant provisioning by the SeedSystemApprovalTemplates listener. Every entry is UPSERT keyed on (tenant_id, application_id, action_key, name) — re-seeding an existing tenant is a no-op unless a new template is added to this file. Templates seed with is_active=true + priority=100 so tenant custom templates (priority 1..50) override them. Small-tier tenants (approval_templates_custom=false) get ONLY these templates.

templates.name: Refunds over $500
templates.description: Every refund with amount ≥ $500 requires manager approval before dispatch. SOC 2 CC6.3 evidence.

groups.description: One finance manager approves; rejection blocks the refund.

templates.name: Refunds over $5000 — director sign-off
templates.description: High-value refunds require director + compliance approval. SOC 2 CC6.3 + PCI-DSS 8.5 evidence.

groups.description: Sequential — kicks in only after finance manager approves.

templates.name: Admin-scope grant requests
templates.description: Grants that include 'admin' or 'manage_*' permissions require both the resource owner AND a tenant admin. SOC 2 CC6.1 + ISO 27001 A.9.2 evidence.

templates.name: Standard grant requests
templates.description: Non-admin grants — resource owner OR tenant admin can approve. Small-tier tenant baseline.

templates.name: Extended impersonation sessions
templates.description: Impersonation session extensions beyond 1 hour require security officer approval. PCI-DSS 8.5 + SOC 2 CC6.7 evidence.

groups.description: Sensitive — short window, aggressive reminder cadence.

templates.name: Bulk-export requests
templates.description: Data exports touching more than 1000 rows OR any row classified regulated_minor require Data Protection Officer approval. GDPR Art. 5(1)(c) + COPPA evidence.
